description: Create a new track based on the 'Phase 5: Duel Assembly & API Updates' of the @docs/plans/001-data-pipeline-plan.md document. Follow the established patterns and guidelines in the docs and codebase. The previous tracks were created and implemented as foundations for this new track, therefore take that into account and make sure that you wouldn't need to create redundant functionality/code for the feature that will be implemented in this track.
